title: Complaints
subtitle: Formal, permanent feedback records
emptyBody: Complaints that match these filters will appear here.
subject: Subject
teacherAndDirectorHelp: Your class teacher and the director will both see this.
directorOnlyHelp: Only the director will see this. Choose this if the complaint concerns a teacher.
immutableWarning: Complaints cannot be edited or deleted after sending.
resolutionPlaceholder: Explain how this complaint was resolved…
withdrawBody: The record will remain visible to the director and cannot be deleted.
sendError: The complaint could not be sent. Try again.
actionError: The change could not be saved. Try again.
